verdict: No strict source-Higgs C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole-row certificate exists on the current PR230 surface.  The strongest current source-Higgs rows are finite-mode support-only smoke rows, and they are blocked from strict use by missing same-surface canonical O_H action/LSZ authority, missing production pole residue rows, and missing FV/IR/model-class/contact controls.
